description: MilPack school packing list data — edit these JSON files to update the app without code changes.

schools.name: Basic Combat Training
schools.description: 10-week foundational Army training for all enlisted soldiers. Covers basic combat skills, physical fitness, weapons qualification, and Army values.

schools.name: Special Forces Assessment & Selection
schools.description: 24-day assessment and selection process for Special Forces candidates.

schools.name: Small Unit Tactics
schools.description: The Small Unit Tactics (SUT) phase of the Special Forces Qualification Course (SFQC) at Camp Mackall, NC. Approximately 6 weeks of intense field training in small unit tactics, land navigation, and combat operations for Special Forces candidates.

schools.name: ARSOF Basic Leader Course
schools.description: The Army Special Operations Forces Basic Leader Course (ARSOF BLC) at Camp Mackall, NC. Supposedly meant for all SOF forces... but we all know it's just a pre-SUT

schools.name: SERE School
schools.description: The Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape (SERE) school at Camp Mackall, NC. Approximately 3 weeks of hell. We've all heard TKs stories and sometimes wish he'd been with us...'

schools.name: Robin Sage Detail
schools.description: For those aiding Robin Sage. What a lame way to spend your summer...

schools.name: Special Forces Preparation Course
schools.description: The Special Forces Preparation Course focuses on physical fitness to prepare candidates for Special Forces Assessment and Selection. We all know it's actually just a vacation though

schools.name: Airborne School
schools.description: Designed to get rid of all the Dirty Nasty Legs in the military. Be the Banana Airborne
